title: Summary: Turn 903
content: P1 of ObsidianExportService completed. Created interface, implementation (384 lines), and test (287 lines). Outputs Obsidian vault with _notions, _relations, per-category _index.md, YAML front matter, bidirectional wiki-links, dedup by from→to:type, file sanitization, Java 1.8 compatible. 9 test cases cover empty, uncategorized, categorized, subcategory, relations, references, comments, sanitize, null path.
